name: constant_price_zero_vol
description: All daily returns are exactly 0.0 across 20 days (constant price, single ticker). Volatility scaling should hit the lower clamp at 0.0 because there is zero dispersion in the daily return series.
derivation: daily_returns[i] = 0.0 * 1.0 * 100.0 = 0.0 for all i. np.std([0.0]*20, ddof=0) = 0.0. Lower clamp on volatility = 0.0 (function naturally returns 0.0 when there is no dispersion).
